name: @memove/root

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=@memove/shared && concurrently --names shared,server,client "npm run build:watch --workspace=@memove/shared" "npm run dev --workspace=@memove/server" "npm run dev --workspace=@memove/client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@memove/shared && npm run build --workspace=@memove/server && npm run build --workspace=@memove/client
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=@memove/shared && npm run test --workspace=@memove/server && npm run test --workspace=@memove/client
scripts.test:cov: npm run test:coverage --workspace=@memove/server && npm run test:coverage --workspace=@memove/client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=@memove/shared && npm run lint --workspace=@memove/server && npm run lint --workspace=@memove/client
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace=@memove/shared && npm run format --workspace=@memove/server && npm run format --workspace=@memove/client
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check --workspace=@memove/shared && npm run format:check --workspace=@memove/server && npm run format:check --workspace=@memove/client

comment:overrides: Force a single React 19 across the workspace so the test renderer (@testing-library/react) and the app share one react-dom.
